ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Poulet cuit (50%) (haut de cuisse de poulet (41,5%), bouillon de volaille (eau, os de poulet, sel, ail), acidifiant : lactate de potassium, sel, fécule de manioc, dextrose de maïs), _Emmental_ (50%).
